calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Attorney Fees Following Appeal
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS RONALD MAR AND JANNIE MAR'S Motion For Attorney Fees Following Appeal.
APPEARANCES: Phillip Hwee, Esq. of Law Office of Phillip Hwee 793-8078 for pltf & opposing party; Amelia V. Vetrone, Esq. 626/795-8560 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendants are awarded $15,000 in fees. The reduction from the amount requested is due to the failure to attach billing records and the failure to explain the basis for the hourly rate. Order signed in open court. (302/HEK) JUDGE HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
